notes: Investigation-only 1xH100 proxy for the demoted #1791-class FLA lane. Do not use it as a promotion gate until canonical byte-counted logs exist.
purpose: Run a cheap single-H100 canonical scorer/debug probe for the demoted #1791-class SP8192 FLA lane without claiming leaderboard validity.
prerequisite: Download the SP8192 custom cache with `MATCHED_FINEWEB_REPO_ID=kevclark/parameter-golf MATCHED_FINEWEB_REMOTE_ROOT_PREFIX=datasets python data/cached_challenge_fineweb.py --variant sp8192`, then verify readiness with `python scripts/check_run_ready.py configs/h100/root_sp8192_pr1791_fla_proxy_1xh100.json`.
success_criteria: Investigation only: finish train/export/eval on one H100 with canonical byte accounting and total artifact bytes under 16,000,000 before any future re-promotion discussion.
